query:
SELECT 
  ol.campaignId,
  oc.name,
  ol.status,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM outreach_leads ol
LEFT JOIN outreach_campaigns oc ON oc.id = ol.campaignId
GROUP BY ol.campaignId, oc.name, ol.status
ORDER BY ol.campaignId, ol.status;
command:

  ol.campaignId,
  oc.name,
  ol.status,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM outreach_leads ol

ORDER BY ol.campaignId, ol.status;
